title: Complete company onboarding and reach the dashboard
description: This verifies that a new company admin can create the tenant, first warehouse, and baseline categories during onboarding and land on the dashboard afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the onboarding link
Complete the company setup form with valid company, admin, warehouse, and category details
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify the initial company setup data is available

title: Complete company setup and enter the dashboard
description: This verifies that a new company admin can finish onboarding and reach a fully initialized dashboard with the first warehouse and baseline categories created.

steps.description: Navigate to /onboarding
Fill in the company name field with a unique company name
Fill in the admin email field with a unique email address
Fill in the admin password field with a valid password
Fill in the warehouse name field with a unique warehouse name
Fill in the categories field with several valid baseline categories
Submit the onboarding form
Verify the dashboard is displayed with initialized tenant data

title: Log in and confirm the authenticated session is active
description: This verifies that a returning user can log in and the app recognizes the authenticated session before showing the main experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify the user session is active

title: Log in and view the current session
description: This verifies that a user can sign in successfully and the app recognizes the active authenticated session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed
Verify the current user session is available

title: Move stock between warehouses successfully
description: This verifies that a user can record a stock transfer and see the source and target stock updated afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the product creation flow with opening stock
Fill in valid product details including name, SKU, category, pricing, unit type, warehouse, batch, and opening quantity
Submit the product creation form
Open the stock transfer flow
Select the created stock and a different warehouse
Fill in a valid transfer quantity
Submit the transfer form
Verify the source and target stock records are updated
Verify the stock movement is shown in history

title: Log out and end the session
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can log out and lose access to the active session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the account or session menu
Click the sign out action
Verify the user is signed out
Verify the login page is displayed

title: Log out successfully from an authenticated session
description: This verifies that a logged-in user can end their session and return to the unauthenticated state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the account menu
Click the log out action
Verify the login screen is displayed
Verify the user is no longer signed in

title: Record a stock entry for an existing product
description: This verifies that a user can add stock to an existing product in a warehouse and see the inventory quantity increase.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the product creation flow
Fill in valid product details including name, SKU, category, pricing, and unit type
Submit the product creation form
Open the stock entry flow
Select the created product and a warehouse
Fill in a valid quantity and batch identifier
Submit the stock entry form
Verify the inventory quantity is increased
Verify the stock entry appears in movement history

title: Record a stock exit for an available stock batch
description: This verifies that a user can remove stock from inventory and create a movement record for the exit.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the product creation flow with opening stock
Fill in valid product details including name, SKU, category, pricing, unit type, warehouse, batch, and opening quantity
Submit the product creation form
Open the stock exit flow
Select the created stock batch
Fill in a valid exit quantity and reason
Submit the stock exit form
Verify the inventory quantity is decreased
Verify the exit movement is shown in history

title: Create a product with opening stock
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can create a product and its initial stock in one flow and see it in inventory afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the product creation flow with opening stock
Fill in valid product details including name, SKU, category, pricing, unit type, warehouse, batch, and opening quantity
Submit the product creation form
Verify the created product appears in the catalog
Verify the opening stock appears in inventory

title: Show an error for invalid login credentials
description: This verifies that incorrect credentials are rejected and the user remains unable to access the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid but unregistered email address
Fill in the password field with an incorrect password
Submit the login form
Verify a login error is visible
Verify the authenticated dashboard is not displayed

title: Invite a warehouse manager from the users area
description: This verifies that a super admin can invite a new team member and create an invitation record from the user management flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the user invitation page
Fill in the invitee email field with a unique email address
Select the warehouse manager role
Select one or more assigned warehouses
Submit the invitation form
Verify the invitation is created
Verify the invited user is shown in the user management area

title: Create a product and view its details before editing it
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can create a product, open its detail view, and save an update to its catalog information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the product creation flow
Fill in valid product details including name, SKU, category, pricing, and unit type
Submit the product creation form
Open the created product details
Update the product with valid changes
Verify the updated product details are displayed
Verify the product remains available in the catalog

title: Create a warehouse and update its capacity
description: This verifies that an authorized user can create a warehouse and later update its location or capacity details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the warehouse creation flow
Fill in valid warehouse details including name, code, address, and capacity
Submit the warehouse creation form
Open the created warehouse details
Update the warehouse capacity with a valid value
Verify the updated warehouse details are displayed
Verify the warehouse appears in the warehouse list

title: Upload a valid product image
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can upload a valid image and receive a usable hosted URL.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/upload
Fill in the authenticated user credentials for the upload request
Attach a valid image file
Submit the upload request
Verify an uploaded image URL is returned
Verify the upload result is usable for product records

title: Accept an invitation and create an account
description: This verifies that an invited user can accept a valid invitation token and complete account creation.

steps.description: Navigate to the invitation acceptance page
Fill in the invitation token field with a valid token
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the invitation acceptance form
Verify the new account is created
Verify the user can access the app with the accepted invitation

title: Delete a warehouse as a super admin
description: This verifies that a super admin can remove an existing warehouse from the system.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the warehouse creation flow
Fill in valid warehouse details including name, code, address, and capacity
Submit the warehouse creation form
Open the created warehouse details
Delete the warehouse
Verify the warehouse is removed from the warehouse list
Verify the warehouse detail view is no longer available

title: Delete a product from the catalog
description: This verifies that a user with delete access can remove an existing product from the catalog.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the product creation flow
Fill in valid product details including name, SKU, category, pricing, and unit type
Submit the product creation form
Open the created product details
Delete the product
Verify the product is removed from the catalog
Verify an empty or deleted state is shown for the product

title: Review dashboard KPIs and aging report
description: This verifies that a user can open the dashboard and review operational metrics along with aging data.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the dashboard
Open the aging report view
Verify dashboard KPI data is displayed
Verify aging report data is displayed

title: View dashboard KPI summary
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can open the dashboard and see inventory KPI summaries.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the dashboard
Verify dashboard KPIs are displayed

title: Review alerts and notifications and mark them as read
description: This verifies that a user can open alerts and notifications, then acknowledge or mark items as read from the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open alerts and notifications
Mark a notification as read
Acknowledge an alert
Verify notifications are displayed
Verify alert status is updated

title: Create a product category
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can create a category with aging settings and see it appear in the category list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the categories page
Start creating a new category
Fill in a unique category name
Select a valid aging concern
Fill in a valid aging duration
Set the category fragility option
Submit the category form
Verify the new category appears in the category list

title: Reject invalid product input
description: This verifies that product creation is blocked when required fields or values are invalid and validation feedback is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the product creation flow
Submit the product creation form without entering required details
Verify validation errors are displayed
Verify the product is not created

title: Reset a forgotten password and sign in with the new password
description: This verifies that a user can request a password reset, set a new password, and then access the app with the updated credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the email field with a registered email address
Submit the password reset request
Open the reset password page using the provided reset token
Fill in the new password field with a valid new password
Submit the password reset form
Verify a password reset confirmation is visible
Verify the user can later access the app with the new password

title: Review aging report insights
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can open the aging report and see aging analysis with classification data.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the aging report
Verify aging report data is displayed

title: Reject warehouse creation for a non-super admin user
description: This verifies that a non-super admin user is blocked from creating a warehouse and sees restricted access feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the warehouse creation flow
Attempt to submit valid warehouse details
Verify restricted access feedback is displayed
Verify the warehouse is not created

description: This verifies that an authenticated user can open the alerts view and see their current alerts.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the alerts page
Verify alerts are displayed

steps.description: Navigate to /login

Submit the login form
Open the analytics page
Verify analytics trend data is displayed

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the alerts page
Select an alert to acknowledge

description: This verifies that product creation shows validation feedback when required information is omitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the product creation flow
Fill in only part of the required product details
Submit the product creation form

title: Review notifications after signing in
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can open their notification feed and see notifications.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the notifications page
Verify notifications are displayed

description: This verifies that a user can resolve an alert and see it removed from the active alert state.

Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the alerts page

title: Block non-super admins from inviting users
description: This verifies that users without the required role cannot access the invitation flow successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the user invitation page
Fill in the invitee email field with a unique email address
Select a role that requires super admin access
Submit the invitation form
Verify an authorization error is visible
Verify no invitation is created

title: Mark all notifications as read
description: This verifies that a user can mark all notifications as read and see the unread state cleared.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the notifications page
Mark all notifications as read
Verify unread notifications are cleared

title: Reject an invalid stock entry quantity
description: This verifies that the stock entry form blocks invalid quantities and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the stock entry flow
Select a product and warehouse
Fill in an invalid quantity
Submit the stock entry form
Verify stock entry validation errors are displayed
Verify no stock movement is created

title: Reject cron access without authentication
description: This verifies that cron jobs are protected and unauthenticated access is denied.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/cron/update-aging
Submit the cron request without authentication
Verify an unauthorized access response is visible

title: View product categories
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can open the categories view and see the current category list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the categories page
Verify categories are displayed

title: Reject alert generation without authentication
description: This verifies that alert generation cannot run without valid cron authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/cron/generate-alerts
Submit the cron request without authentication
Verify an authorization failure response is visible

title: Reject a stock exit that exceeds available quantity
description: This verifies that a user cannot remove more stock than is available and the inventory remains unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the product creation flow with opening stock
Fill in valid product details including name, SKU, category, pricing, unit type, warehouse, batch, and opening quantity
Submit the product creation form
Open the stock exit flow
Select the created stock batch
Fill in an exit quantity greater than the available stock
Submit the stock exit form
Verify an insufficient stock error is displayed
Verify the stock quantity does not change

title: Reject image upload without authentication
description: This verifies that unauthenticated upload attempts are blocked.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/upload
Attach a valid image file
Submit the upload request without authentication
Verify an authorization failure response is visible

title: Reject onboarding with missing required details
description: This verifies that onboarding validation prevents creating a company when required setup fields are incomplete.

steps.description: Navigate to /onboarding
Leave one or more required onboarding fields empty
Submit the onboarding form
Verify onboarding validation errors are visible
Verify the dashboard is not displayed

title: Reject invalid category input
description: This verifies that invalid category values are blocked and a validation error is shown without creating the category.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the categories page
Start creating a new category
Submit the category form with missing or invalid values
Verify a category validation error is visible

title: Recalculate stock aging for authenticated cron access
description: This verifies that an authenticated cron request recalculates stock aging successfully and returns a completed result.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/cron/update-aging
Fill in the authenticated bearer token for the cron job
Submit the cron request
Verify the aging recalculation completes successfully
Verify updated stock aging data is available

title: Reject image upload with an invalid file
description: This verifies that the upload flow blocks unsupported file input and does not produce a hosted image URL.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/upload
Fill in the authenticated user credentials for the upload request
Attach an unsupported file type
Submit the upload request
Verify a file validation error is visible
Verify no uploaded image URL is returned

title: Reject an invalid or expired reset token
description: This verifies that a password reset cannot be completed with a token that is no longer valid.

steps.description: Navigate to a reset password page using an invalid or expired token
Fill in the new password field with a valid new password
Submit the reset password form
Verify a reset token validation error is visible
Verify the password is not reset

title: Handle an empty notification inbox
description: This verifies that a user with no unread notifications sees an empty or cleared notification state after marking all as read.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the notifications page
Mark all notifications as read
Verify an empty notification state is displayed

title: Generate inventory alerts from authenticated cron access
description: This verifies that an authenticated cron request generates inventory alerts successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/cron/generate-alerts
Fill in the authenticated bearer token for the cron job
Submit the cron request
Verify alert generation completes successfully
Verify generated alerts are available
